title: (Bearish Signal) REKR enters Downtrend as Momentum indicator drops below 0 level on Apr 19, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This indicator may be signaling that REKR's price has further to drop, since it fell below its price logged 14 days ago. Traders may consider selling the stock, shorting the stock, or exploring put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested 77 similar cases where REKR's Momentum Indicator fell below the 0 level, and 64 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 83%. Current price $18.78 crossed the support line at $19.55 and is trading between $19.55 support and $5.31 support lines. Throughout the month of 03/17/21 - 04/19/21, the price experienced a +6% Uptrend, while the week of 04/12/21 - 04/19/21 shows a -8% Downtrend.

https://preview.redd.it/55c301t3jcu61.png?width=1524&format=png&auto=webp&s=87814470eb92232748914105b10848ba0d03b172

**Bearish Trend Analysis**

The 10-day RSI Indicator for REKR moved out of overbought territory on March 22, 2021. This could be a bearish sign for the stock. Traders may want to consider selling the stock or buying put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor looked at 31 similar instances where the indicator moved out of overbought territory. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 27 of the 31 cases, the stock moved lower in the following days. This puts the odds of a move lower at 87%.

The Momentum Indicator moved below the 0 level on April 19, 2021. You may want to consider selling the stock, shorting the stock, or exploring put options on REKR as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 64 of 77 cases where the Momentum Indicator fell below 0, the stock fell further within the subsequent month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 83%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence Histogram (MACD) for REKR turned negative on April 14, 2021. This could be a sign that the stock is set to turn lower in the coming weeks. Traders may want to sell the stock or buy put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor looked at 33 similar instances when the indicator turned negative. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 23 of the 33 cases the stock turned lower in the days that followed. This puts the odds of success at 70%.

Following a 3-day decline, the stock is projected to fall further. Considering past instances where REKR declined for three days, the price rose further in 50 of 62 cases within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 85%.

[Full information about signal](https://tickeron.com/news/10682299-rekor-systems-rekr-19-88-enters-downtrend-as-momentum-indicator-drops-below-0-level-on-apr-19-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=signal)
